storyInfo: Ray goes to Jerry and Keira's family gathering at their invitation. She just wants to take her little sandbeast for a walk, but their eager relatives have other plans.

attributes.content: Hurry up! It's already 13:00! As soon as we finish lunch we need to start cooking! Golden carrots must be first on the list! Trust me. It's not a real feast without golden carrots!
attributes.name: Raucous Crowd

attributes.content: Where are the plates? There aren't enough plates here! Where are the bowls? And we'll need at least twenty more tables, and chairs! My thirteenth uncle's second aunt came too, and she's bringing her five little kids. How exciting!
attributes.name: Raucous Crowd

attributes.content: Hey! The whole reason I came here was to cook for you! So what if I'm a guest? Are you seriously not going to let me cook? Hurry up and hand me the spatula!
attributes.name: Raucous Crowd

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Come here, Sandbeast.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: You're not afraid of all this noise? You... like it?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw! Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Hey, Jerry, look! I see Ray over there!
attributes.name: Keira

attributes.content: Oh! Hey, Ray! We're over here!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Is someone calling me?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: —over here!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Oh, Jerry! It's you!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I'm so sorry. There are just so many people here. I yelled as loud as I possibly could!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: After Keira and I got back from our honeymoon, I wanted to throw a thank-you party for you. Then somehow the guest list just kept growing... Still, I'm really happy with how it turned out!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Because no one here would have thought that Keira and I would end up together, after we both ran away from the altar...
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Jerry... It's awfully noisy here. I can't hear what you're saying!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Can you speak a bit louder?
attributes.name: Keira

attributes.content: (Takes a deep breath)
attributes.name: Jerry
Jerry
attributes.content: I SAID...

attributes.name: Jerry
attributes.content: THAT KEIRA AND I...

attributes.name: Jerry
attributes.content: ARE VERY GLAD YOU COULD MAKE IT!
Okay. I heard you that time!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Oh—and I have to say, Keira and I both think that if you hadn't been there, so much of what followed wouldn't even have happened!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: That's right!
attributes.name: Keira

attributes.content: Keira and I wouldn't have ended up running away and then meeting like that! We wouldn't have gotten to know each other so quickly! And everything else that happened afterward... WE TRULY HAVE TO THANK YOU!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Ah. I heard that too!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Did I make that much of a difference, really?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: OF—COURSE!
attributes.name: Keira

attributes.content: If you hadn't hijacked the truck, maybe Keira and I would never have met up! Who knows when or if I'd have my family pushing me down another path.
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: That is why we're so grateful to you, Ray!
attributes.name: Keira

attributes.content: THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR THE HIJACKING!!!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Hijacking? Did you hear that? Did I get the word wrong?
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: I remember Jerry said he was carjacked. They crashed through the checkpoint and had a fight with the guard. That was all her doing?
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: What? I can't hear you! You're saying that she stole Jerry away?
attributes.name: Sixth Uncle

attributes.content: What? It's too noisy! You're saying she jacked the truck... for Jerry?!
attributes.name: Seventeenth Sister

attributes.content: What?! She crashed through the checkpoint and had a fight with the guard, only to hijack the truck and take Jerry away?!
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: WHAT?!
attributes.name: Raucous Crowd

attributes.content: Sorry, Ray, but we still have so much to do. Do you still remember where you're sitting?
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Yes. Pavilion 3, near the geyser, table 12, seat 6.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Warmy will be to the left of you, and Alanna to the right. There's also a wooden crate there for your sandbeast.
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Right.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray, you just have to try our cooking tonight! OKAY! See you later!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Sure!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: (Happily stretches its backfin)
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: (Happily digs into the sand)
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Now, sandbeast. This isn't your personal playground. You can't behave like that.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw! Wraw! Wraw! Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: You've been so hyper ever since we got back to Rim Billiton.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: ...Sandbeast.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I've saved up a bit of money. We don't have to work tomorrow. Let me take you out to the wilderness for a little while right now.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I know you want to go run in the wilds, dig tunnels, and play with the sand.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Look! It's right over there. I'll stay here and build us a little shelter. You go on ahead. I'll keep an eye on you.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: Wraw! Wraw—wraw!
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: Sandbeast, let's go out and play while we have the chance.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Long ago I took a sandbeast, my first sandbeast, to the wilderness to play.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: It was so happy, as happy as you are now.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: (Points out the window towards the wilderness)
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Let's go have some fun, yeah?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: (Rubs excitedly)
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: First we'll go get a map, and then we'll find you some snacks. Then we'll borrow Lanns's car.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Let's go!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Has that girl been talking to the sandbeast ever since Jerry and Keira left?
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: She jacked a truck so she could take Jerry away...
attributes.name: Seventeenth Sister

attributes.content: She looks like she's in bad shape...
attributes.name: Sixth Uncle

attributes.content: Huh? Look... she left already? She doesn't even want to stay for the meal?
attributes.name: Seventeenth Sister

attributes.content: That doesn't seem right. I think you lot should follow her. Don't leave her alone!
attributes.name: Seventeenth Sister

attributes.content: I've been following her from a distance, don't worry. After she left, she went straight to that little shop outside town—probably to buy something.
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: Yup. I saw her walk in there. Don't worry. I'll go over there and get a few more groceries. What do you all need?
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: Cystymilk, onions, cheese... okay, got it.
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: Lanns said it was here, from what I remember... preserved corpses, skeletons, photographs...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Here's the place. Easy.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Hello? Is anyone here? I'd like a map showing the locations of large sandbeast caves nearby.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Huh? Who are you? Maps? You came here for 'Fins on the Night Desert' too?
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: I heard that legend before, but that's not why I'm here.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Then why are you here? What do you all think this is, a wishing well that anyone can stop by?
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: I'm a pitsinker. These are my old work credentials, medical report, and attendance records… If you help me, I can take you to any abandoned mine or underground cave you want to visit.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: What do you think about that?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Now that's new—never seen anyone like you, coming here like you're applying for a job or something. Alright, let me take a look...
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Oh? You actually managed to tame that little thing?
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: No. It just followed me here on its own.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Followed you here? Huh. Interesting.
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: This is... a Rhodes Island dining card? You're from Rhodes Island?
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Alright—you've worked as a pitsinker, you can tame a sandbeast, and you're a Rhodes Island operator... If the Doctor picked you, you must have some skills. Here, take the map.
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: Leave me your contact. Next time I want to explore a cave, I'll contact you.
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: Alright. I've finished my shopping. Let me see where she is... huh? Wait a minute, she... what is she going to that shop for? Is that... an animal carcass... and is that a corpse?
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: No. There's just no way I can let her stay in that kind of place by herself. I need to go see what's going on! Oh this is awful!
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: Hey! Unhand my guest!
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: Wha? What now? Where did you come from?
attributes.name: Asbestos

attributes.content: Whoa? Huh? Where is she? Where did she go?
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: Dammit! I lost track of her!
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: Don't worry. I was on my way back from rinsing out some old barbecue barrels in the mines, and I saw her coming right this way after I got your message.
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: Yes, she was there with the sandbeast. I'm sure you'll see her in another ten minutes or so.
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: You still need four more barbecue barrels, huh? Alright. I'll bring them over right away!
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: Sandbeast, look over there. We've found what we were looking for.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: The mushrooms and moss that grow in the mine tunnels... they're tasty and good for your health. They can help sandbeasts purge toxins.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw.
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Well, today you can eat a little less feed and instead snack on some moss and mushrooms. Think of it as 'picnic food'!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Come with me. We'll go find some.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Sandbeast, hold on to me tight. We're about to head down.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Hey! Hey! What are you doing?!
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: Uh oh. I've got some bad news. I was just finishing brushing one of the barrels when I saw her go down into the mine!
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: To make matters worse, it's an abandoned mine. I don't dare go in there myself. I'll stand guard at the entrance until she comes back up!
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: I heard a sound coming from up above us. Did you hear it, Sandbeast?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Munchmunch...
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Wraw?
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Maybe it was the wind.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Hey. Don't eat so much. We need to bring some moss and mushrooms back with us, you know.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: If you eat so much that we exceed the lift's weight limit, we won't be able to get back up there.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Twenty minutes later...
*burp*
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Good. Let out another burp, and maybe we'll still be able to use the lift.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw! Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: *burp*
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Okay. Great. Grab on tight. We're gonna go back up now.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Now we have only one thing left to do. We're going to ask Lanns if we can borrow her truck.
attributes.name: Ray
Ray
attributes.content: Huff...

attributes.name: Ray
attributes.content: We still have enough time left.
Lanns, I want to borrow your ute.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Huh? Why? You're travelling?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: You're not going to the banquet, Ray? I made my sweet meat soup!
attributes.name: Warmy

attributes.content: It's not that. I just suddenly have the urge to take Sandbeast out for a stroll.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I'll be back before the banquet starts.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: You sure you'll come back?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Yes. Last time I left the ship to watch the burdenbeasts dancing under the moon, I got in trouble.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: The HR Operator said next time I have to report in first, to avoid interrupting everyone's work.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: You told me that before I make a decision, I need to stop and think about it first.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray stops for a second and thinks about it.
Well I've thought about this one. Jerry and Keira keep telling me how much they want to thank me. If I don't come back for the banquet, they'll be very hurt.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: So... I'll definitely be back.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray finishes speaking. She looks as if she's finally figured out the answer to a major question, and she gives a small nod to herself.
Yes. I'll come back for the banquet.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wow. I never thought you'd actually remember what I told you! Alright then. Here are the keys. Be careful out there.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Right, Ray, well, you have to try my sweet meat soup at the banquet, yeah?
attributes.name: Warmy

attributes.content: Of course. I will.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Alright then. I'd best be going.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: *huff huff* I finally finished greeting each and every guest, and arranging all their seats... I'm exhausted!
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Well, let's take a little break...
attributes.name: Keira

attributes.content: It feels so good now that I've gotten all that done...
attributes.name: Keira

attributes.content: Help! Something terrible happened!
What?
attributes.name: Keira & Jerry

attributes.content: No no no... We lost her! Who here has seen that quiet Cautus girl?
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: I watched her go into this horrifying hut—it was full of bones and corpses, and the woman inside looked terrifying. I have no idea what happened to her in there!
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: After Ninth Auntie lost track of her, she immediately sent us a message. I happened to see her nearby, but I was a step too late—she went straight into an abandoned mine shaft. I called for her over and over, but no one answered!
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: Huh? That can't be right. I just saw her here. She was driving a truck, heading over that way!
attributes.name: Sixth Uncle

attributes.content: Who? Which way?
attributes.name: Keira & Jerry

attributes.content: Sixth Uncle points his finger at the window.
Everyone looks over towards the window—a trail of dust gradually fades into the horizon.
She was heading south. There aren't any mines or villages over there because of all the sandbeast burrows. It's kind of a no-man's land. Is she... in trouble? Does she have a death wish or something?
attributes.name: Sixth Uncle

attributes.content: Wha?
attributes.name: Keira & Jerry

attributes.content: Jerry, she hijacked a truck for you before. Come on. You can't just let her run around by herself over there like that!
attributes.name: Sixth Uncle

attributes.content: What?!
attributes.name: Keira & Jerry

attributes.content: The sandbeasts lounge about, stirring up the sand as they slowly trudge across the boundless desert, enjoying the cool night air.
The transport vehicle comes to a stop in the distance. One woman, and one beast, jump out from it.
Look, Sandbeast. We're here.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Here. I'll rearrange your moss and mushrooms for you. There we go.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Go out and play. You'll love it.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw—!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: The little sandbeast lets out a joyful cry and charges into the pack up ahead. It merrily rolls around, rubbing up against all the other sandbeasts.
The pack doesn't reject the newcomer. Instead, they warmly welcome its arrival, gently nudging it and sniffing its scent.
They are all carrying the same mushrooms and moss, which occasionally emit a faint glow when they bump into each other.
Wraaaaw—
attributes.name: Pack of Sandbeasts

attributes.content: Wraw—wraw—
attributes.name: Pack of Sandbeasts

attributes.content: Wraw! Wraw!
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Ray is carrying those same mushrooms and moss, and thus, emits the same occasional faint glow herself. She breathes in the fresh scent of the plants and slowly trails after the pack.
Here, Sandbeast. Eat up.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I looked these mushrooms and moss up in a book. If you eat them, the color of the veins on your back will go back to normal, and you'll feel better.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Kwh—kwh—!
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: Kwh...
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: Do you feel any better?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Sorry. I'll stay close by your side and pay more attention to your health from now on, Sandbeast, especially when we're cleansing infected creatures.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I won't let you get more than five steps away from me.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw...
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: Wraw, wraw.
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: You stood up! Are you better now?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw, wraw!
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: Oh! I'm so glad, Sandbeast!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray reaches out her hand and strokes the sandbeast's backfin, inspecting the color of the veins to make sure it has really recovered.
The sandbeast snuggles its head against Ray's hand and shifts into a comfortable position in her arms.
Sandbeast...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I've saved up a bit of money. We don't have to work tomorrow. Let me take you out to the wilderness for a little while right now.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I know you want to go run in the wilds, dig tunnels, and play with the sand.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Look! It's right over there. I'll stay here and build us a little shelter. You go on ahead. I'll keep an eye on you.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: Wraw! Wraw—wraw!
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: The sandbeast runs off excitedly into the wilderness, but quickly turns back around and gently nudges its head against Ray's ankle.
It's almost as if it's asking her to venture with it into the wilderness.
You want me to go play with you?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: Oh, Sandbeast! Calm down! I'm about to lose my balance here! You've spilled mushrooms and moss all over me!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Oh look. After you bump into them... they start glowing?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: It's actually quite pretty.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraaaaw—
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: I guess we'll keep wearing them then.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Alright. Let's go have some fun. I'll put off building the hut for a bit.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Follow me, Sandbeast!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: Sandbeast

attributes.content: These sandbeasts... sometimes when they are digging underground, they will dig into the mines.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Is that how they learned that these mushrooms and moss... remove toxins?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: The sandbeast pack, of course, aren't able to answer the Cautus's question, even though she's wearing the same mushrooms and moss that they are.
They happily jostle to and fro, lighting up the mushrooms and moss hanging from their bodies, before ravenously gulping them down.
In the darkness the pack seems to float effortlessly across the desert, like a huge school of fins swimming slowly toward the glimmering moonlight.
Ray stands there, watching them.
This is the first time I've ever seen anything like this. I guess the 'Fins on the Night Desert' is a real thing.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I guess... they were talking about sandbeasts...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: And my Sandbeast.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray starts running... and her faint glow returns.
She catches up to the sandbeasts, like a wayward fin returning to its school.
(Whistles)
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: *huff* *huff* ... Sandbeast!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Sandbeast! Should I give you a proper name?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: A name for my first sandbeast!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: What's a good name for you?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Hmm...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw?
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: I'll call you... 'Glowy'?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw...
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Don't like that name?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: 'Shiny'? 'Lighty'?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw...
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Haha. No. You don't like any of those names...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I don't think I'm too good at picking names.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Let me noodle on it a bit more...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Well you keep saying 'wraw' 'wraw'... how about I call you 'Rory' for now?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw?!
attributes.name: 'Rory' (for now)

attributes.content: Relax! Relax!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Oh come on! Jerry and Keira just explained everything to you—it was all a misunderstanding! Ray didn't hijack the ute to run off with Jerry, and she wasn't trying to commit suicide in the wilderness!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: She just wanted to take her sandbeast out to have some fun. It's no big deal. You don't need to worry.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: If you don't believe me, ask Potlid!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Yes. Lanns is right. Ray said she'd be back in time for the banquet.
attributes.name: Warmy

attributes.content: The banquet is scheduled to start at 21:30. She still has two minutes to get here.
attributes.name: Jerry

attributes.content: Is she really going to come back safely?
attributes.name: Half-believing Crowd

attributes.content: We really don't need to go find her?
attributes.name: Half-believing Crowd

attributes.content: Believe me. Ray promised me that she'd be back!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: It's almost 21:30. Listen to me...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Let the banquet—begin!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: *huff* I'm back.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Let me think... oh right, I'm seated at pavilion 3, near the geyser, table 12, seat 6.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Potlid is sitting to my left, and Lanns is sitting to my right. There's also a wooden crate for Rory.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Right. This is the place.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Wraw!
attributes.name: 'Rory' (for now)

attributes.content: Wow. The barbecue smells wonderful. The stew doesn't look half bad either...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Hm?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: What's wrong? No one wants to eat?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Uhh... We'd like to ask...
attributes.name: Sixth Uncle

attributes.content: Go ahead.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: You didn't drive that truck into the no-man's land... because you suddenly lost your marbles and wanted to do something stupid?
attributes.name: Sixth Uncle

attributes.content: You didn't go into that terrifying hut to buy poison, and/or something equally awful?
attributes.name: Ninth Auntie

attributes.content: You didn't have some kind of mental breakdown, get lost, and end up in that abandoned mine?
attributes.name: Fourteenth Brother

attributes.content: What are you all saying? Of course not!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I took it out on a picnic.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Look.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray holds up the sandbeast at her feet, whose belly is now full and round.
The little sandbeast fidgets just slightly.
*burp*
attributes.name: 'Rory' (for now)

attributes.content: See! I told you!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Well, let's eat!
attributes.name: Alanna
